orgId.title: Organization ID
orgId.description: Internal identifier for the deploying organization (e.g. acme-corp).

orgDisplayName.title: Organization display name
orgDisplayName.description: Shown in the extension UI (e.g. Acme Corp).

securityProfile.title: Security profile
securityProfile.description: Force personal or organization (team) mode for all users.

teamPassphrase.title: Team passphrase
teamPassphrase.description: Shared team passphrase. Stored encrypted on each device. Rotates when IT updates this policy.

passphraseFromVault.title: Team passphrase from external vault
passphraseFromVault.description: When true, users enter the team passphrase from their password manager once per browser session. When false (recommended with teamPassphrase), one-click secure with no popup.

useSavedPassphrase.title: One-click secure
useSavedPassphrase.description: Use the stored team passphrase without prompting.

setupComplete.title: Skip first-run setup
setupComplete.description: When true, users go straight to the main popup.
